data.title: 国际服红冬推特贴集赞小活动 #1
data.summary: A peculiar flyer has arrived from Red Winter! Rumor has it that if you spread the flyers being distr
data.body:
A peculiar flyer has arrived from Red Winter!
Rumor has it that if you spread the flyers being distributed one by one starting today, special rewards and content will be revealed… But what could they be?

➡️Learn More: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3418919

链接正文：

Trade your boring routine for festive music and shared excitement! 🥁
A flyer filled with passionate energy has arrived from an anonymous Red Winter Partygoer!

Check out the flyer posted across various Blue Archive official SNS channels!
If the total number of reactions (replies, comments, likes, shares, etc.) to the flyer exceeds 10,000, special rewards and content celebrating the festival will be revealed.

Please check the details below and show your support for the anonymous Red Winter Partygoer!

 

🔹 Event Period

- April 8 (Wed) ~ Until further notice

 

🔹 Event Details
STEP 1. Check the letter from the anonymous Red Winter Partygoer on Blue Archive official SNS channels.

- Flyer posts will be released sequentially starting Wednesday, April 8.

- Links: [Blue Archive X] / [Blue Archive Official YouTube Channel] (Visit the community tab on Youtube!)

- The flyer is also available on other Blue Archive official SNS channels in different languages.

STEP 2. Participate in the event by leaving a reaction (reply, comment, like, share, etc.) on the flyer post.

STEP 3. If the total number of reactions across official SNS channels reaches 10,000 or more, event rewards will be revealed.

- All reactions across all official SNS channels will be counted together.

 

🔹 Event Rewards

- When a total of 10,000 reactions is reached, commemorative rewards—including a special video—will be revealed.

- Details regarding the rewards and content will be announced separately at a later date.

 

❗ Notes ❗

- This notice may be changed, modified, or removed, so please check back regularly.
